---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition or change
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What's the motivation**
The problem this addresses, or the research question it would enable.

**Proposed approach**
A short sketch — module(s) involved, expected behaviour, any APIs you'd change.

**Alternatives considered**
Other ways of solving the same problem.

**Scope and effort**
A rough estimate of size (small / medium / large) and any dependencies on other issues.
